---
title: "06 GenomicsDBImport"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Import gVCFs into GATK GenomicsDB workspaces by 5 Mb intervals.

# Inputs

- Sample map:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/sample_maps/gdb_sample_map_922.tsv`
- Intervals:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/intervals/intervals_5mb.list`

# Outputs

- GenomicsDB workspaces:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/workspaces/`

# Script

- `scripts/06_genomicsdb_import/genomicsdb_import_array_922.sbatch`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb
sbatch --array=1-149 scripts/genomicsdb_import_array_922.sbatch
```
